    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.MusicDashboardApplication
     
    MainController - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.controller
    Static navigation hub for the application.

    MINIMUM_PLAY_SECONDS - Static variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.utils.PlaybackConstants
    Minimum duration for a play to be counted as valid.

    Standalone modal controller for displaying paginated lists.

    month - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.MonthlyReportData

    MonthlyReport - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity
    JPA entity that persists a pre-computed monthly listening summary for one user.
    MonthlyReport() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.entity.MonthlyReport
     
    MonthlyReportData - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto
    Display record holding the pre-formatted data for a single monthly report card.
    MonthlyReportData(int, int, int, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.MonthlyReportData
     
    MonthlyReportRepository - Interface in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.repository
    Spring Data JPA repository for MonthlyReport entities.
    MonthlyReportService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service
    Generates and persists monthly listening reports for the current user.
    MonthlyReportService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.MonthlyReportService
     
    MonthlyReportViewModel - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel
    Loads monthly report data asynchronously for a given year and month.
    MonthlyReportViewModel() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.Analytics.viewmodel.MonthlyReportViewModel
     
    monthName - Variable in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.dto.MonthlyReportData

    Spring Boot application entry point.

    Returns the value of the musicPlayerService record component.

    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(n) where n = queue size
    MusicPlayerService() - Constructor for class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.MusicPlayerService
